english_text:
FINITE
The one who knows
That which is known
KNOWLEDGE
ATTRIBUTES
INFINITE
AL-ALIM — The all-knowing
CAUSE
EFFECT
alt_text: Teaching diagram of the divine name al-'Alim. A boxed 'FINITE' panel on the left shows 'al-'Alim / The one who knows' (a man silhouette labelled CAUSE) → 'al-'Alam / That which is known' (a galaxy image labelled EFFECT), with a 'KNOWLEDGE' (علم) arrow between them and an 'ATTRIBUTES' arrow outward. Outside the box on the right: 'الله / Al-Alim — The all-knowing' under the heading 'INFINITE'.
notes: Pedagogical: deriving the divine name al-'Alim by analogy from finite human knowing — the cause/effect/attribute relation lifted to the infinite.
